name: C-15 freshness gate marker lives at .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/<framework-id>.txt
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && printf '2026-05-25T08:00:00Z' > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/gdpr.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/freshness-gate.sh" --framework-id gdpr --fetch-frequency weekly --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z && echo path 1>&2
